headline: Jim Cramer on International Flavors & Fragrances: “We Think That the Turnabout Is Real”
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar. Answering a caller’s query about the stock, Cramer said: We were going to do a piece on IFF because we think that the turnabout is real. And then, let me tell you, sir, we decided to hold off because it […]

headline: 3 Reasons IFF is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances’s 21.6% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 15.1%, and its stock price has climbed to $79.94 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Compass Diversified Holdings Announces Changes to its Board of Directors – Increases Board to Eight Directors
summary: WESTPORT, Conn., March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI) (“CODI” or the “Company”), an owner of leading middle-market branded businesses, announced today that, effective March 1, 2026, Mr. Eugene Kim and Mr. Glenn Richter have been elected to the Company’s Board of Directors (the “Board”). Mr. Alexander S. Bhathal resigned from the Board effective February 28, 2026, due to other commitments. Based on a recommendation from the Board’s Nominating & Corporate Governance

Mr. Alexander S. Bhathal resigned from the Board effective February 28, 2026, due to other commitments. Based on a recommendation from the Board’s Nominating & Corporate Governance

headline: A Look At International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) Valuation After Portfolio Sale And Sustainable Fragrance Expansion
summary: Why IFF’s recent moves matter for investors International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) has been reshaping its business, completing the sale of soy crush, concentrates and lecithin operations to Bunge, while also pushing further into sustainable fragrance ingredients and capacity expansion in France. See our latest analysis for International Flavors & Fragrances. Those portfolio moves and the push into sustainable fragrance ingredients come as the share price sits at US$80.75, with a 30-day...
